chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.D-4751 of 2022 ____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For order on office objection No.4 & 18 2. For hearing of CMA No.20198/2022 3. For hearing of main case 25.08.2025 Mr. Ali Safdar Depar, AAG --------- This is an old petition of 2022. It was last taken up on 16.11.2022, which is almost 03 years ago. In the last 03 years, learned counsel for the petitioner has not made any serious efforts to have this petition fixed for hearing. Once-again, today, despite the lapse of 03 years, learned counsel for the petitioner is called absent without intimation. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this old petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith pending application(s). Head of Const. Benches JUDGE Nadir*
